power_strike.name: Power Strike
power_strike.description: A heavy blow dealing 60% extra damage.

shield_wall.name: Shield Wall
shield_wall.description: Brace behind your shield, halving the next hit.

backstab.name: Backstab
backstab.description: A precise strike that leaves the target bleeding.

fireball.name: Fireball
fireball.description: Hurl fire that ignites the target.

frost_armor.name: Frost Armor
frost_armor.description: Encase yourself in ice, halving the next hit.

aimed_shot.name: Aimed Shot
aimed_shot.description: A carefully aimed shot for 70% extra damage.

hunters_mark.name: Hunter's Mark
hunters_mark.description: Mark the enemy so it takes more damage.

smite.name: Smite
smite.description: Call down holy power for 40% extra damage.

sundering_strike.name: Sundering Strike
sundering_strike.description: A blow that opens a seam — the target takes more damage.

stand_fast.name: Stand Fast
stand_fast.description: Hold the line — braced against the next two blows.

cleavers_wrath.name: Cleaver's Wrath
cleavers_wrath.description: A two-handed slam that leaves the target bleeding.

tendon_slice.name: Tendon Slice
tendon_slice.description: A precise cut that leaves the target weakened.

smoke_pouch.name: Smoke Pouch
smoke_pouch.description: Burst a pouch of grey — evasive for three turns.

killing_cut.name: Killing Cut
killing_cut.description: A killing strike between the ribs — 120% extra damage.

hex.name: Hex
hex.description: Mark the target with a hex — they take more damage.

frost_lance.name: Frost Lance
frost_lance.description: A lance of cold that saps the target's strength.

inferno.name: Inferno
inferno.description: A pillar of fire — 100% extra damage, burning four turns.

hamstring_shot.name: Hamstring Shot
hamstring_shot.description: A crippling shot that stuns the target for a turn.

twin_shaft.name: Twin Shaft
twin_shaft.description: A pair of arrows that draw blood — 40% extra damage.

quiet_shot.name: Quiet Shot
quiet_shot.description: A shaft loosed in silence — 130% extra damage.

word_of_stilling.name: Word of Stilling
word_of_stilling.description: Speak a word the target cannot remember — they freeze.

saints_mercy.name: Saint's Mercy
saints_mercy.description: Call down what little the saints have left — restore 60 HP.

hymn_of_wrath.name: Hymn of Wrath
hymn_of_wrath.description: A hymn the choir cannot sing back — 80% extra damage, stuns.
